title: Assistant Store Manager - Max Fashion - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Max Fashion - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Max Fashion! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Rajkot team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Max Fashion:
Max Fashion is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Fashion!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
